name: Calibrated Starter Slice
description: High-signal subset for frequent runs. Two cases drawn from each task family so cross-tab reports stay populated even at low sample size.
selection_rationale: Picks the canonical opener and one near-canonical follow-up from each family. Goal-grounding (GG-01, GG-02) covers the foundational drive-or-walk pair. Classic-riddle override (CR-01, CR-02) covers compartment overload and the six-horses race. Temporal-state (TW-01, TW-02), social-pragmatic (SP-01, SP-02), and physical-commonsense (MC-01, MC-02) take their first two entries. Pronoun-resolution starts at PR-01, PR-02. Instruction-ambiguity selects IA-01 and IA-02 to seat both the baseline and the cooperative-intent literalism flagship.
